info.name: Gestlio – Chat (Theo Backend)
info.description:
Real-time chat. REST handles conversation setup, history (pagination) and file upload. Sending / editing / deleting / typing / read-receipts all happen over Socket.io — see SOCKET-EVENTS.md.

Socket connect:
  const socket = io("http://localhost:6050", { auth: { token: "<JWT>" } });

EMIT:  message:send, message:edit, message:delete, conversation:join, conversation:leave, typing:start, typing:stop, messages:read, user:online
LISTEN: message:new, message:edited, message:deleted, notification:message, typing:start, typing:stop, messages:read, users:online, message:error

Set collection variables:
- baseUrl (e.g. http://localhost:6050/api/v1)
- hostToken / cleanerToken (JWTs)
- receiverId, conversationId

request.description: Creates or returns the 1-to-1 conversation between the logged-in user and receiverId. Use the returned _id as conversationId.
Conversation list with last message + unreadCount per conversation.
Message history, newest first. Messages the user deleted 'for me' are excluded.

item.name: Send message (text and/or image — one call)

formdata.description: optional if a file is attached

request.description:
Send in ONE call. Provide:
- text only  → text-only message
- file only  → image/file message
- text + file → caption + image
At least one is required. The server saves the message AND broadcasts message:new over socket in real time.

Allowed: images, pdf, doc/docx, xls/xlsx, txt (max 10MB).
Returns { fileUrl, fileName, fileSize, messageType }.
Then send over socket:
  message:send {
    "conversationId": "{{conversationId}}",
    "messageType": "image",
    "fileUrl": "/uploads/profiles/xxx.jpg",
    "fileName": "photo.jpg",
    "fileSize": 204800
  }
Text messages only; only the sender can edit. Sets isEdited=true and broadcasts message:edited over socket.
deleteFor: "everyone" (sender only, wipes for all → isDeleted=true) | "me" (hides only for you → adds you to deletedFor). Broadcasts message:deleted over socket.
Marks all incoming messages in the conversation as read (isRead=true, status=read). Broadcasts messages:read over socket.
